title: Baler Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baler with a Z-Score of +4.14. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Baler is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is very low at 1.2 km/h, reducing any potential relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
